Emojis are used in [[Chat]].

To send an emoji, press on the emoji picker and select an emoji, or type in <code>[emoji]</code> in the chat where <code>emoji</code> is a 2- or 3-digit number.

==Emotes==
=== [[File:Emoji_icon1.png|frameless|75x75px]] Snail===
{|class= "wikitable
!Identifier
!Image
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[01]||
[[File:Emoji_01.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[02]||
[[File:Emoji_02.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[03]||
[[File:Emoji_03.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[04]||
[[File:Emoji_04.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[05]||
[[File:Emoji_05.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[06]||
[[File:Emoji_06.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[07]||
[[File:Emoji_07.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[08]||
[[File:Emoji_08.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[09]||
[[File:Emoji_09.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[10]||
[[File:Emoji_10.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[11]||
[[File:Emoji_11.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[12]||
[[File:Emoji_12.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[13]||
[[File:Emoji_13.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[14]||
[[File:Emoji_14.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[15]||
[[File:Emoji_15.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[16]||
[[File:Emoji_16.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[17]||
[[File:Emoji_17.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[18]||
[[File:Emoji_18.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[19]||
[[File:Emoji_19.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[20]||
[[File:Emoji_20.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
|style="text-align: center;"|[21]||
[[File:Emoji_21.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|}

===Unlockable Emotes===

==== [[File:Emoji_icon3.png|frameless|75x75px]] Athena====
Athena emotes are unlocked after reaching max bond with [[Shining Athena]].

{|class= "wikitable

!Identifier
!Image
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[101]||
[[File:Emoji_101.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[102]||
[[File:Emoji_102.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[103]||
[[File:Emoji_103.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[104]||
[[File:Emoji_104.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[105]||
[[File:Emoji_105.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[106]||
[[File:Emoji_106.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[107]||
[[File:Emoji_107.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|}

====[[File:Emoji_icon2.png|frameless|75x75px]] Bird====
Bird emotes are unlocked after unlocking [[Hatchery]].

{|class= "wikitable
!Identifier
!Image
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[201]||
[[File:Emoji_201.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[202]||
[[File:Emoji_202.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[203]||
[[File:Emoji_203.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|}

====[[File:Emoji_icon4.png|frameless|75x75px]] Toad====

Toad emotes are available for purchase through the QCPlay Payment Center. They are larger than standard emojis and cannot be combined with messages. 

{|class= "wikitable
!Identifier
!Image
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[1301]||
[[File:emoji_1301.png|frameless|100x100px|Toad Sends Love]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[1302]||
[[File:emoji_1302.png|frameless|100x100px|Toad Angry]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[1303]||
[[File:emoji_1303.png|frameless|100x100px|Toad Dozing Off]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[1304]||
[[File:emoji_1304.png|frameless|100x100px|Toad Grabs Popcorn]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[1305]||
[[File:emoji_1305.png|frameless|100x100px|Toad Stay Strong]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[1306]||
[[File:emoji_1306.png|frameless|100x100px|Toad Deep in Thought]]
|-
|}

===Limited-Time Emotes===

====[[File:Emoji_icon5.png|frameless|75x75px]] Red Riding Hood====
Red Riding Hood Emotes emotes were available during the [[Little Red Riding Hood Event]], Jan. 26 - Feb. 08 2024.

{|class= "wikitable

!Identifier
!Image
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[801]||
[[File:Emoji_801.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[802]||
[[File:Emoji_802.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[803]||
[[File:Emoji_803.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[804]||
[[File:Emoji_804.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[805]||
[[File:Emoji_805.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[806]||
[[File:Emoji_806.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[807]||
[[File:Emoji_807.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|-
| style="text-align: center;"|[808]||
[[File:Emoji_808.png|frameless|75x75px]]
|}
